title: Cosmopolitan Shanghai Is an Uneasy Fit in China’s Narrative of Western Sins
summary_full: Shanghai’s many layers of architecture, culture and politics have made it a difficult fit for the Communist Party’s preferred narrative of Chinese victimhood and Western sins.
summary_public: Shanghai’s many layers of architecture, culture and politics have made it a difficult fit for the Communist Party’s preferred narrative of Chinese victimhood and Western sins.
